creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
Tested latest commit from [0], both low and high DPI versions.

Building with TEST option requires devel/catch2 as TEST_DEPENDS, which is not being built by the latest poudriere-devel. Some trick may be needed, like BUILD_DEPENDS+= ${TEST_DEPENDS}, until poudriere issue #1131 be fixed [1]. Otherwise builds OK.

Playtested with AMD 7850 Pitcairn 2GB 1920×1080@60, both low and high DPI versions, though without multimedia support. It works well. High DPI graphics is impressive. Thank you for your effort!

[0] https://github.com/AMDmi3/freebsd-ports/tree/playtesting/games/endless-sky
[1] https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/1131#issuecomment-2073099527
